sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what's at rows 48-55, cols 26-50
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Rows 48-55, cols 26-50:")
for i in range(48, 56):
    print(f"  {i}: {ascii_lines[i][26:50]}")

# Check blue and U-shape positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['b', 'Y']:
        print(f"{n['color']}: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Try moving DOWN one more time
result = action(['DOWN'])
print("\nAfter DOWN:")
print("  Stopped:", result.get('stop_reason', 'completed'))
print("  No impact:", result.get('no_impact', False))
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        print(f"  Blue: boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
